# Atom Miners™

> Infrastructure-grade hardware distributor specializing in ASIC miners, AI accelerators, mining containers, and industrial power equipment for serious compute operations.

Atom Miners™ is an authorized distributor for leading manufacturers including Bitmain, MicroBT, Canaan, NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, and Huawei. The company serves mining operations, data centers, and AI labs across 45+ countries, providing end-to-end infrastructure from single-unit deployments to multi-megawatt container farms.

## Products

- [ASIC Miners](https://shop.atomminers.com/product-category/asic/): SHA-256, Scrypt, and Ethash mining rigs from Bitmain (Antminer series), MicroBT (Whatsminer), Canaan (Avalon), and others. Brand new units with full warranty options.
- [Power Equipment](https://shop.atomminers.com/product-category/power/): Industrial-grade PDUs, transformers, UPS systems, and switchgear designed for continuous high-density compute workloads. Scalable from rack to campus.
- [Mining Containers](https://shop.atomminers.com/product-category/containers/): Deployable, pre-fitted mining containers with integrated cooling (air-cooled, immersion, hydro-cooling), electrical panels, and rack infrastructure. Ready to operate in days.
- [AI Accelerators](https://shop.atomminers.com/product-category/ai/): High-performance GPU clusters and purpose-built AI inference and training hardware from Nvidia, AMD, Intel, Huawei, and others for LLM and HPC workloads.

## Key Facts

- 50+ products in catalog
- 24/7 technical support
- Ships to 45+ countries
- Headquarters: Shenzhen, Guangdong Province, China
- Regional hubs in Europe, North America, and Southeast Asia

## Services

- Spot inventory and bulk pre-orders
- Leasing options and hardware buyback programs
- Bonded warehousing, customs clearance, and white-glove delivery
- End-to-end infrastructure supply, configuration, and support

- Email: orders@atomminers.com (quotes, product inquiries, bulk pricing — replies within 2–3 business hours)

- Website: https://atomminers.com
- Shop: https://shop.atomminers.com
